title: Healthcare SaaS Agreement
contract_text: SaaS Agreement between HealthCo and MedPlatform processing patient data.

clauses.text: MedPlatform shall implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to secure Patient Data.
MedPlatform may share de-identified data with research partners and commercial affiliates.
Term: 5 years, automatically renewing for 5-year periods unless cancelled 12 months in advance.
HealthCo bears unlimited liability for any unauthorized access to Patient Data, even if caused by MedPlatform.
MedPlatform may terminate at will with 30 days notice.
Upon a change of control of HealthCo, MedPlatform may immediately renegotiate or terminate.
MedPlatform's liability is capped at USD 25,000 in aggregate.
Data subjects may request access and deletion via the in-product portal.
HealthCo shall not engage any competing platform for 3 years post-termination.
